title: About
paragraphs: I’m a software engineer with 17+ years of experience in backend development, specializing in building reliable APIs and scalable systems using Java and Spring-based technologies.

In recent years, I’ve been expanding into DevOps and Cloud Engineering, working hands-on with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and Infrastructure as Code. My focus is on improving automation, deployment workflows, and building reliable, production-ready cloud systems.

I hold industry certifications including AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate, AWS Certified Developer Associate, Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA), and HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate, which reflect my commitment to developing practical skills in cloud platforms and modern infrastructure practices.

I have a strong interest in AWS cloud architecture and enjoy learning how different services integrate to build scalable and resilient systems. I continuously explore best practices around infrastructure design, security, and cost-efficient deployments.
This portfolio is built as a practical DevOps showcase, demonstrating how I apply Terraform-managed infrastructure, secure CI/CD practices, and cloud-native architecture in real-world projects.
